temporary_badge.name: Temporary Badge
temporary_badge.description: A D.A.S.H. visitor badge. Valid 24 hours. Smells like warm laminate. My name is slightly misspelled.

paper_cup.name: Paper Cup
paper_cup.description: Government-issue paper cup. It's thinner than a campaign promise.

cup_of_water.name: Cup of Water
cup_of_water.description: A paper cup full of lukewarm water. It's not coffee, but it's honest work.

lost_cat_flyer.name: Lost Cat Flyer
lost_cat_flyer.description: Missing: Patches. Orange tabby. Last seen in the server room, B2 level. If found, contact Hal, ext. 1997. There's a crude drawing of the cat that's honestly kind of adorable.
